items.name: Rendang Croizza
items.description: A flaky croissant, dressed like a pizza, topped with slow-cooked beef rendang. Familiar flavor, unfamiliar shape.

items.name: Pistachio Croissant
items.description: Buttery layers filled with pistachio cream and finished with crushed nuts. Nutty, fragrant, gently sweet.

items.name: Masak Lemak Ciabatta
items.description: Crusty Italian bread, stuffed with bright yellow masak lemak chicken. Spicy, creamy, tangy, never oily.

items.name: Garlic Confit Focaccia
items.description: Olive oil-poached garlic, rosemary, and flaky sea salt on a pillowy slab. Tear and share, or don't.

items.name: Burnt Cheesecake Slice
items.description: Basque-style, wobbly centre, caramelised top. Served with a dusting of sea salt.

items.name: Gula Apong Latte
items.description: Espresso swirled with Sarawakian palm sugar and steamed milk. Smoky, caramel, unmistakably Malaysian.

items.name: Matcha Strawberry Latte
items.description: Ceremonial-grade matcha layered with strawberry puree and creamy oat milk. Instagram-worthy, genuinely delicious.

items.name: Coconut Matcha
items.description: Shaded matcha whisked with coconut cream and a whisper of pandan. Tropical, grounding, green.

items.name: Classic Butter Croissant
items.description: 27 laminations, French butter, baked until the edges crackle. The standard by which we measure the day.

items.name: Coffee Cream Croissant
items.description: Espresso-infused pastry cream, cherry jam centre, Biscoff crumb finish. For the indecisive sweet tooth.

items.name: Ondeh-Ondeh Pastry
items.description: Flaky puff pastry pockets filled with gula melaka and desiccated coconut. A Malaysian classic, reimagined.

items.name: Butterscotch Latte
items.description: House-made butterscotch, double ristretto, velvet foam. Like a hug in a ceramic cup.

items.name: Dendeng Ciabatta
items.description: Spicy-sweet beef dendeng tucked into a crusty ciabatta with pickled onions. Bold, unapologetic, addictive.

items.name: Ayam Balado Focaccia
items.description: Minang-style spicy chicken on rosemary focaccia. Heat, herbs, and heritage in every bite.

items.name: Pandan Gula Melaka Cake
items.description: Chiffon layers, gula melaka caramel, toasted coconut. The cake your grandmother wishes she invented.
